claims.quote: As part of a nurse residency program at Jackson Health System you will be part of a comprehensive educational program that offers clinical, classroom, and simulation learning aimed at enhancing the application of theory to practice. This program is geared towards newly graduate Registered Nurses and experienced Registered Nurses looking to gain experience in a new nursing specialty.
claims.claimText: Page describes a Nurse Residency Program for newly graduate and experienced Registered Nurses at Jackson Health System — not a physician program.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Content is nursing residency (RN), not physician training; outside USCEHub's physician-pipeline tiers but captured as future-lane nursing-careers signal.
claims.limitations: Nurse residency, not physician residency. No USCE / IMG / medical-student content on page.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family RESIDENCY_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Jackson Health System – Nurse ResidencyOverviewSpecialtiesEligibilityFAQsResidency Application & Schedule Overview
claims.claimText: URL-based hint classified this as RESIDENCY / Tier 2 physician training, but content is a Nurse (RN) residency program. Family should be PROVIDER_CAREERS / nursing, not physician GME.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Source hint mismatch: URL/path implied physician residency family, but cleaned text describes Registered Nurse residency — not a physician training program.
claims.limitations: Mismatch between deepSourceHint (RESIDENCY/Tier 2) and actual content (nurse residency).
claims.visibilityRationale: source family RESIDENCY_PAGE is future-lane only
